questions: Does removing isHelixTagged: true from the CLI POST body break comment posting?

answers.answer: No. The server defaults isHelixTagged to false when not provided (comment-controller.ts line 65-66). For Helix sandbox agents, the server forces isHelixTagged=true based on the isHelixAgent JWT claim. For external CLI users, comments correctly get isHelixTagged=false unless @Helix was mentioned.
evidence: API test with hxi_ key returned isHelixTagged: false, isAgentAuthored: false
CLI typecheck and build both pass

statement: Removed hardcoded isHelixTagged: true from CLI post.ts. The CLI now sends only { content: message }, letting the server determine attribution. Typecheck and build pass.
